prompt: Run a full website audit on anthropic.com

assertions.text: Report contains all 5 category sections: AEO, GEO, SEO Technical, SEO On-Page, Structured Data
Report contains an AI Crawler Policy section with training/retrieval bot analysis and a strategy grade
Report includes indexability checks (noindex, soft 404, canonical)
Report shows multiple pages were crawled (not just the homepage) — at least 3 distinct URLs
Scores and grades are present for each category and overall, following the A+/A/B+/B/C+/C/D/F scale
Check results include specific evidence (actual values found, not just PASS/FAIL)
Report ends with a priority fix list ordered by severity
